column3: How in control did you feel during this trial?
column4: What was your primary emotion during this trial?
column5: If the robot failed, which of the below corrections do you think would have helped your communication? (Pick Top 3)
column6: If the robot failed, which non-verbal behaviors would have improved your communication.

column5: Clarifying Prompt — “Sorry, I didn’t understand. Could you repeat the item?”, Specific Re-Direction — “Open drawer 1 — I’ve highlighted it.”, Self-Correction & Acknowledgment — “My mistake — the item is in drawer 1.”, Confidence Check — “Did you mean the epinephrine syringe? Please confirm.”, Multimodal Redundancy — Speech + lights highlight the drawer together., Guided Reset — “Let’s reset. Close all drawers and say the item again.”, Partial Understanding Repair — “I heard part of your request. Which version did you mean?”
